outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: 0DTE stable (+10.98B GEX) but WEEKLY/MONTHLY negative GEX (-12.74B combined) will amplify moves. Net negative total GEX suggests dealers short gamma.
outlook.summary: Spot at 6603.5 sits on MONTHLY PUT WALL with Max Pain magnet at 6625 just above. Extreme PCR (3.63 MONTHLY) indicates heavy hedging. Reverse smirk in 0DTE (bullish) conflicts with smirk in longer expiries (bearish). Key tension between 6500 RESONANCE support and 6800/6900 resistance zone.
